mission_name: 1) UM6P university - leader and bridge for Sub-Saharan Africa
mission_desc: UM6P university (universite mohammed 6 polytechnic um6p.ma) is a young, well-funded and rapidly growing research university in Morocco, now ranked among the top 500 research universities globally. UM6P's goals include becoming a center for world-leading research, increasing the number of highly-educated Moroccans, and becoming a leader and bridge for Sub-Saharan Africa. Please give us some awesome ideas for how we can do that.
